a.xlink:title: Creates a directory path, including parent directories if needed.
< Public access specifier for the following members.
Sets up the environment for model inference (prediction).
Builds a complete path for output files based on configured settings.
Builds the project structure, possibly setting up directories or initial configurations.
Dumps mass plots for a given k-fold.
Starts an I/O session, opening a file for reading or writing.
Triggers the generation of a ROOT PCM (Precompiled Module) if needed for dictionary generation.
Fetches tags, possibly related to data versions, processing stages, or k-folds.
Builds or calculates metrics for evaluating model performance.
Dumps all metric plots for a specific k-fold.
